title: Mike Clarke
text: Home * People * Mike Clarke Michael R.B. (Mike) Clarke († 1994), was a British statistician and computer scientist at University of London Institute of Computer Science (ICS) , since 1974, head of CS and Statistics at Queen Mary, University of London [1] . He researched and published on computer chess, organized the Advances in Computer Chess 3 conference, 1981 in London , and was editor of the proceedings of Advances in Computer Chess 1 [2] , Advances in Computer Chess 2 and Advances in Computer Chess 3 [3] . He was chess player [4] and chess composer . Michael Clarke deceased in early 1994 of stomach cancer [5] .
